scripts.build: tsc --build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.join(__dirname,'src/providers/QQProvider/parsers/messageSegment.proto');const dst=p.join(__dirname,'dist/providers/QQProvider/parsers/messageSegment.proto');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(dst),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied messageSegment.proto to dist')}"
scripts.dev:build: rimraf tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && npm run build && node ../../scripts/redirectRequire.js && node ../../scripts/fixESMExtensions.mjs && node dist/index.js
